review_text: Battery life is an absolute joke. I charge these every night and they're dead by lunch. Advertised 8 hours is a complete lie. Returning them.
Sound is genuinely great but the left earbud keeps disconnecting every 10 minutes. Have to put them back in the case and re-pair every time.
Best earbuds I've owned at this price. Sound is warm and rich, ANC is surprisingly good. Highly recommend to anyone.
Case doesn't charge the earbuds properly. Left them in overnight, woke up to 0%. The latch is too loose and they don't sit on the contacts.
Decent sound but no EQ controls in the app is a real miss. I want to boost the bass. The flat default is too mid-heavy for my taste.
Package arrived completely crushed. The earbuds still work but the case has a dent and the box was soaked. Terrible packaging from the warehouse.
Ordered on Jan 3, arrived Jan 12. Website said 3-5 days. Nine days is not 3-5 days. No tracking updates for 4 of those days.
Really happy with the ANC. Blocks out my open office completely. Battery could be better but sound quality makes up for it.
Left earbud drops connection constantly. Right one is totally fine. Classic hardware defect. Exchanged once and got the same issue again.
Incredible sound for the price. Punchy bass, clear mids. Wore them for a 3-hour flight with ANC on and it was fantastic.
Requested a refund 10 days ago. Still waiting. Support keeps saying 'under review'. This is completely unacceptable for a simple return.
App crashes every time I try to save EQ settings on Android 14. Completely unusable. iOS users seem fine. Fix the Android app.
The noise cancellation on these is seriously impressive. My coworkers have headphones costing 3x as much and these match them easily.
Really wanted to love these. Sound is beautiful. But the battery life with ANC on is about 2 hours. Unusable for my commute.
Delivered to wrong address. Neighbour brought it over two days later. Courier marked it delivered to correct address. That's fraud.
Fit is comfortable for me, I have smaller ears. Sound is exceptional. Minor gripe: no auto-pause when you take one out.
Charging case hinge cracked after 3 weeks. The plastic quality is terrible. Earbuds still work but this is cheap build quality for the price.
Mic quality is poor on calls. The person I'm talking to says I sound muffled especially outdoors. Wind noise is awful.
Just wow. ANC, great sound, comfortable. My only wish is they supported connecting to two devices at once. Will definitely buy again.
Left earbud disconnects within minutes every single time. I've factory reset twice. Nothing has been fixed based on the reviews.
Perfect fit straight out of the bag. True to size, great stretch in the fabric. Comfortable for office and casual. Will order every colour.
Runs at least two sizes small. I'm normally a 32 and the 32 barely gets past my thighs. The size chart is completely wrong. Returning.
Material feels cheap and scratchy. Not what the product photos suggest at all. Seams are uneven and one pocket is misaligned.
Good quality for the price. Fabric is soft, colour is accurate to the photos. Slight stretch makes them very comfortable.
Ordered navy, received khaki. The packing slip even says navy. Someone clearly picked the wrong item. Now have to go through a return.
Fit is okay but waist is tight while thighs are loose. The cut is not ideal for athletic builds. Sizing guidance should mention this.
Exceptional quality for the price point. The fabric is thick and premium feeling. Holds its shape after washing. Bought three pairs.
Arrived 11 days after ordering with no communication. Estimated delivery was 4 days. No one answered when I called support to chase it.
Stitching on the back pocket came apart after two washes. These are not durable at all. Disappointed given the price.
Nice chinos overall. Colour is rich and accurate. Fits true to size for me. Only minor issue is the zipper feels slightly cheap.
Return process is a nightmare. Website says free returns but the portal is broken. Been trying for 5 days, ticket still open, no response.
These are my new favourite trousers. Slim without being tight, stretchy without being baggy. Colour doesn't fade after multiple washes. Love them.
Size M fits like an XS. Had to return and size up twice. The size guide on the website is inaccurate and cost me a lot of time.
Received a completely different item — a women's blouse in my order. How does this happen? Now waiting for them to fix their mistake.
Decent product but the inseam is shorter than the listed length. Fine if you're under 6ft but I had to return for a different option.
Best chinos I've bought online. Fit is spot on, material is excellent, arrived in 2 days. Exactly what was described. Very happy.
Fabric pills after just a few washes. Looks worn out in weeks. For the price I expect much better durability.
Support chat is useless. Been trying to sort a refund for a wrong item for 2 weeks. Agents keep closing the ticket without resolving it.
Really pleased with these. Soft material, accurate sizing, smart look. Would buy again. Delivery was quick too.
Colour faded dramatically after first wash. The navy is now more of a grey. Clearly poor dye quality. Not what I paid for.
This coffee maker is a game changer. App scheduling is seamless, coffee quality is consistently excellent, and it looks beautiful on my counter.
Leaks from the water reservoir every single time. My counter is soaked after every brew. Completely unusable. Returning immediately.
App disconnects from the machine constantly. Have to re-pair via Bluetooth every morning which defeats the entire purpose of smart scheduling.
Really great coffee quality. Heating is even, flavour is excellent. App could be more reliable but the manual controls work perfectly.
Arrived with the glass carafe cracked. Clearly not inspected before shipping. Getting a replacement but shouldn't have to deal with this.
Best purchase I've made this year. Coffee is incredible, setup took 5 minutes, app is intuitive. Waking up to fresh coffee is life changing.
Grinder is extremely loud. Wakes up the whole house at 6am. There is no slow-start or quiet mode. Completely defeats the purpose of scheduling.
Refund approved 3 weeks ago. Money still not in my account. Support says it's 'processing'. Three weeks for a bank transfer is not acceptable.
Great coffee maker. Temperature control is precise, the brew strength options are well calibrated. Would love a quieter grinder.
Water reservoir cracked after 6 weeks of normal use. The plastic is clearly too thin. This is a design flaw not a one-off.
I've tried many coffee makers and this is the best. Temperature precision, brew strength options, app scheduling — all perfect. Highly recommend.
App crashes on iOS 17 when trying to set a schedule. Worked for a week then stopped. Manual brewing works but I paid for smart features.
Took 15 days to arrive. Ordered express shipping and was charged for it. No explanation, no refund of the shipping cost. Terrible service.
Excellent build quality and great tasting coffee. The temperature holds steady throughout the brew. Minor issue with app but coffee is the priority.
Decent coffee maker with a flawed app. The manual experience is great but half the smart features don't work reliably. Could be much better.
The carafe handle snapped off after 2 months of normal use. The weld point is clearly a weak point in the design. Dangerous if it had been full.
Perfect in every way. Coffee quality is outstanding, app works flawlessly since the update, and the design looks premium. Worth every penny.
Three chat agents, two emails, still no resolution on my refund. Every agent asks for the same information. The support process is broken.
Love this machine. Coffee is consistently better than my old maker. The app scheduling is convenient when it works. Build quality feels solid.
App won't connect to machine after the latest firmware update. Support told me to wait for a patch. I paid for smart features not a basic kettle.
Battery after firmware 2.3 update is 2 hours. Before it was 6-7 hours. Whatever changed in that update destroyed battery life completely.
Phenomenal sound quality. I'm an audio engineer and these are impressive at this price. The tuning is clearly done by people who care.
Arrived in a bag not a box. Earbuds unprotected, case scratched, no documentation included. Looked like someone returned these already.
Switched from Sony WF-1000XM5 hoping to save money. Sound is comparable but missing multipoint Bluetooth and battery is worse. Might go back.
Charging contacts corrode quickly. After 5 weeks mine stopped charging one earbud. Had to physically bend the contact pin back. Poor build.
These are the best trousers I own. Premium fabric, accurate sizing, excellent stitching. Wear them twice a week and they still look new.
Ordered Jan 20, still not here Feb 3. Tracking hasn't updated in 8 days. Support says it's lost in transit. Now waiting for a replacement.
Seam on the right leg split after 3 wears. These are not durable at all for the asking price. Quality control is clearly lacking.
Nice trousers. Fit is accurate, fabric is comfortable. Colour matched the website perfectly. Quick delivery too, arrived next day.
Return label keeps failing to generate. Website errors every time. Been stuck with the wrong size item for 12 days now. Very frustrated.
Absolutely love these. The stretch fabric makes them suitable for everything from meetings to hiking. Best everyday trousers I've found.
Decent trousers but the fit around the hips is strange. Slim through the leg but too much fabric at the hip. Looks boxy from behind.
Received completely wrong size even though I ordered medium. Tag says XL. Someone in the warehouse clearly mislabelled these.
Good quality chinos at a fair price. Fabric feels premium, fit is slim without being restrictive. Would recommend to anyone who works in an office.
Button on the waistband fell off after first wear. The threading is minimal — clear quality control failure. Returning these.
This is how a smart appliance should work. App is stable, coffee is excellent, scheduling just works. Best coffee maker I've owned.
Machine stopped working after 6 weeks. Shows an error code that isn't in the manual. Support is taking days to respond. Completely failed.
Grinder jams at least twice a week with standard beans. Have to manually clear it every time. Not suitable for daily use at all.
Great coffee, great design. The temperature precision really shows in the cup. App is a bit slow to connect but always does eventually.
Parcel left outside in heavy rain. Machine itself seems fine but packaging was destroyed and accessories were water damaged. Appalling delivery.
Amazing value. Sound rivals products costing 3x as much. ANC is a genuine standout feature. Would buy again without hesitation.
Left earbud loses connection within 5 minutes every time. Tried everything. Reset, re-pair, different devices. It's a hardware problem.
Refund was approved but store credit was issued instead of a bank refund. I did not consent to store credit. Feels like a bait and switch.
Love the sound quality. The spatial imaging is impressive. Would love spatial audio with head tracking in a future firmware update.
Perfect office trousers. Slim cut looks sharp, fabric breathes well, wash and wear without ironing. Reordering in two more colours.
Paid for next-day delivery, arrived 4 days later. No compensation offered. When I complained, support just said delays happen. Unhelpful.
Colour faded significantly after two washes. The fabric dye is not colourfast. This is a manufacturing defect, not normal wear.
Outstanding machine. Coffee is consistently excellent, the carafe keeps it hot for over an hour, and the app scheduling is very convenient.
App updated and now the schedule wipe every time the machine loses power. Completely broken. My morning routine is ruined every power cut.
Mixed experience. Coffee quality is genuinely great but the app is unreliable and the grinder is noisy. Half the product is excellent.
Good sound but uncomfortable after an hour. My ears get sore at the canal entrance. Wish they included a medium-large tip size.
Mic quality on outdoor calls is embarrassing. My callers can't hear me over wind noise. For this price the mic should be better.
These earbuds sound incredible. Genuinely audiophile-grade for the price. ANC is top-tier. My only request is multipoint Bluetooth for v2.
Item shown as delivered but never received. Neighbour confirmed nothing left at door. Filed a claim and support asked me to wait 14 days to investigate.
Really solid chinos. Fit is accurate, fabric quality is good, stitching looks durable. Delivery was fast. Will buy again.
Waistband stitching unravelled after 4 wears. Completely unwearable now. The finish quality is not acceptable for the listed price.
Genuinely the best coffee maker I've used. The temperature control is precise, the brew is consistent, and the app scheduling works perfectly.
Water tank cracked after 8 weeks of normal use. The plastic walls are clearly too thin. This is a design flaw — I've seen this exact complaint many times.
Machine sent error E4 on week 9. Not in the manual. Support told me to factory reset which wiped all my settings. Still erroring.
Left bud drops constantly. Used them for 2 months hoping it would improve. It hasn't. Going back to Sony WF-1000XM5.
Sound quality is jaw-dropping for the price. ANC is world-class. Battery with ANC on could be better but everything else is outstanding.
Android app is completely broken. Crashes on open on Android 14. All settings reset to default. Months since this was reported, still not fixed.
These are my go-to trousers now. Quality is consistent, fit is reliable, and they hold up brilliantly after washing. Excellent value.
Package opened on arrival and items were clearly not new — there were creases, a faint smell and one pocket had fluff in it. Sent a used item.
Nice style and colour but the size runs very small. Please update the size guide to reflect this. I had to exchange and it took 10 days.
Solid coffee maker. Makes excellent coffee consistently. The app has improved a lot with recent updates. Very happy with this purchase.
Grinder makes a terrible sound every morning. It is genuinely too loud to use before 8am without waking the household. Needs a quiet mode.
Refund still not processed after 4 weeks. Been told it is approved three times. Money has not appeared. Escalating to my bank for a chargeback.
Really solid earbuds overall. Love the sound. Wish there were more EQ presets — bass boost, vocal clarity. Minor gripe.
Touch sensitivity is absurd. Wore these to the gym and ended up calling my boss by accident. Please add a sports lock mode.
Stunning quality for the price. The fabric is genuinely premium, sits perfectly on the waist, and the colour is exactly as shown. Very impressed.
Support responded to my complaint about wrong item with a generic copy-paste reply. Asked for order number again even though I included it. Useless.
Nothing to complain about. Coffee quality is superb, app is reliable, machine looks great in my kitchen. Best appliance I've bought in years.
Coffee quality is excellent but build quality worries me. The water tank plastic feels fragile. Hoping it doesn't crack like I've seen in reviews.
Battery drains to 0 in under 2 hours with ANC. Before the last firmware update I was getting 6 hours. This is a serious regression. Please fix.
Perfect commuter earbuds. ANC blocks out everything on my morning train. Sound is detailed and musical. Money very well spent.
Paid for 2-day shipping, took 6 days. No proactive communication at all. Only found out when I chased with support. Poor logistics management.
Great machine overall. Coffee is consistently delicious. The carafe design is clever and keeps heat well. App scheduling makes mornings easy.
Good earbuds with some rough edges. No multipoint is inconvenient for working from home. Sony has had this feature for years.
Machine leaked and shorted my kitchen socket. This is a safety hazard. I have reported it to trading standards. Completely unacceptable.
